## Validation

- [ ] Backend lint: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Backend typecheck: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Backend unit tests: `npx jest --runInBand`
- [ ] Backend e2e tests: `npm run test:e2e`

- [ ] Frontend build: `npm run build`
